summary: The diff implements a comprehensive trip planning form replacement with extensive new fields including trip type, journey type, vehicle type, duration handling, location modes (manual/GPS), and contact information. Backend data model and createTrip function updated accordingly. However, several requirements have incomplete or missing implementation details in the visible diff evidence.

missing_requirements.requirement: Display informational popup modal when customer selects a Journey Type option
missing_requirements.reason: Modal implementation visible in RideRequestForm.tsx but diff is truncated before validation of all acceptance criteria (popup appearance timing, correct text display, OK button dismissal, modal blocking behavior)

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement smart Hire Duration field for Local trips with dropdown 2-12 hours plus Custom option
missing_requirements.reason: Duration state variables exist but implementation is truncated - cannot verify dropdown options, Custom input field reveal, or minimum 2-hour validation

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement Hire Duration for Outstation trips with date-time pickers and auto-calculation
missing_requirements.reason: Date-time state and calculation logic visible but implementation truncated - cannot verify picker rendering, duration display format, or complete validation error handling

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement Use GPS mode with Get My Location button and geolocation capture
missing_requirements.reason: GPS handler function visible but truncated - cannot verify button rendering, coordinate capture, address display, or optional field behavior

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement GPS permission denial fallback with automatic mode switch
missing_requirements.reason: Geolocation error handling started but truncated - cannot verify automatic mode switch, error message display, or retry capability

missing_requirements.requirement: Display informational message at bottom of form about automatic fare calculation
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence in visible diff of the message 'Fare will be calculated automatically and confirmed by admin pricing rules.' being displayed

missing_requirements.requirement: Update backend createTrip function to accept and validate all new trip fields
missing_requirements.reason: Backend main.mo truncated before createTrip function implementation - cannot verify parameter validation, conditional requirements based on tripType/journeyType, or error messages

missing_requirements.requirement: Update frontend RideRequestForm component with comprehensive booking form in specified field order
missing_requirements.reason: RideRequestForm.tsx heavily truncated - cannot verify complete field order (Trip Type, Journey Type, Vehicle Type, Hire Duration, Location Mode, Contact), mobile-friendly layout, or form submission integration

hallucinated_features.description: Migration module added to backend with old/new trip type definitions and migration logic
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest explicitly constrains 'Do NOT modify backend/migration.mo unless absolutely necessary for new Trip type fields' but migration.mo was added with full migration run function when existing trip transformation could potentially be handled differently
